paper.title_en: A Gauge Model for Quasi-Dirac Neutrinos
paper.abstract_en: In a model with $L_μ - L_τ$ Abelian gauge symmetry, anomaly-free chiral fermions, which are Standard Model singlets, are introduced as the origin of right-handed neutrinos. This $\mathsf{U} (1)$ symmetry keeps the right-handed neutrinos Majorana massless. Tiny nonvanishing Dirac masses of neutrinos are due to higher-dimensional operators with natural coupling constants. After gauge symmetry breaking, a quasi-Dirac neutrino scenario naturally appears, and realistic neutrino physics can be produced. Phenomenological and cosmological aspects of the model are discussed.

reasons: 未达到主题关键词门槛
